subject: [PATCH v3 09/10] nfsd: make the copy offload stateid a first-class nfs4_stid

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch makes the copy offload stateid a first-class nfs4_stid by promoting it to a per-client object, allocated from the client's cl_stateids via nfs4_alloc_stid(). This change improves the lifetime model of async copies and reuses common id allocation and refcounting mechanisms. The async-copy lifetime model remains unchanged, with nf4_put_copy() now dropping the stid's single reference, which removes it from cl_stateids and frees the slab. The patch also updates various paths to handle the new stateid type correctly.
